title: -5 oz of fish (no oil)
html:
March 2021 hybrid diet-plan-and-grocery dump by Yahir: 5 oz fish (no oil) + 1 cup steamed vegetables, "read sweat equity dude" (likely Sweat Equity), "talk about trick shot with emilio," and a multi-page bulk-shop list (Diet Coke, 10 large avocados, 2 jicama, 2 pineapple, 2 melon, 5 lb onions, spinach Popeyes).

TL;DR

  • Diet-tracking + brother-tracking + reading-list in one note — the stacked-column pattern that recurs across Yahir's 2021–2022 corpus.
  • "Read sweat equity dude" likely Sara Blakely / Sweat Equity book reference — sits in the same self-improvement reading thread as the 2022 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream reading list.
  • emilio mention is brother-relationship mainline.

yahir gonzalez · emilio · corvallis or · 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream

related.label: Ahmad Jamal stream — late-2022 polymath dump (jazz, crypto, ChatGPT, CS 162)
